visual_summary: Line Shadow Text is a UI component that displays text with a line shadow effect. It's suitable for use cases where you want to add a subtle shadow to your text without making it too complex. The component can be customized with a different shadow color.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics:

Name: Line Shadow Text
Description: Line Shadow Text is a UI component that displays text with a line shadow effect. It's suitable for use cases where you want to add a subtle shadow to your text without making it too complex. The component can be customized with a different shadow color.
Style: material design, simple
Interactions: static, passive
Tags: text, shadow, UI component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
